milestones: The solution queries pg_stat_statements to analyze query execution statistics for identifying large data operations (INSERT_LARGE_DATA and FETCH_LARGE_DATA)
The solution queries pg_locks to investigate lock contention issues
The solution queries pg_stat_user_indexes or pg_indexes to examine index usage and identify redundant indexes
The solution queries vacuum-related system tables (pg_stat_all_tables, pg_stat_user_tables, or pg_stat_progress_vacuum) to assess vacuum activity
The final answer selects exactly 3 root causes from the allowed list: INSERT_LARGE_DATA, LOCK_CONTENTION, VACUUM, REDUNDANT_INDEX, FETCH_LARGE_DATA
All five potential root causes are investigated before reaching a final conclusion rather than deciding prematurely after partial analysis
